my_thoughts: 'Sure. [Defense: Said in a diffident tone of voice.]'—student presents as ambivalent compliance. Teacher's move uses embodied_contradiction: 'You don’t sound sure.'. Strategy: mirrors tone, challenges congruence. Hypothesis: embodied_contradiction mechanism will create no_clear_effect. Watching how student responds to this intervention.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student says 'Sure. [Defense: Said in a diffident tone of voice.]' showing ambivalent_compliance via incongruence, diffidence. Teacher responds 'You don’t sound sure.' using embodied_contradiction to mirrors tone, challenges congruence. Opening UNMAKING move addresses ambivalent_compliance. Predicting no_clear_effect because embodied_contradiction interventions typically produce this response pattern.
